ddls:
CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., primary care, specialist) */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Participation status (e.g., participating, non-participating) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the provider */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the provider */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* Specialties offered by the provider */,
  "languages_supported" TEXT /* Languages supported by the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of medical service (e.g., primary care, diagnostic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical service */,
  "is_preventive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is preventive */,
  "requires_referral" INTEGER /* Indicates if a referral is required for the service */,
  "requires_preauthorization" INTEGER /* Indicates if preauthorization is required for the service */,
  "is_covered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is covered under the insurance plan */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code for the medical service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance policy */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Coverage limit for the policy */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "coinsurance_rate" REAL /* Coinsurance rate for the policy */,
  "copay" REAL /* Copay amount for the policy */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium amount for the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy (e.g., individual, family) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the policy */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance policy the patient is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service cost */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical service */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance policy */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., primary care, specialist) */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Cost amount for the service */,
  "deductible_applies" INTEGER /* Indicates if the deductible applies to the service */,
  "coinsurance_applies" INTEGER /* Indicates if coinsurance applies to the service */,
  "copay_applies" INTEGER /* Indicates if copay applies to the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_costs_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_costs_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES medical_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being referred */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical service being referred for */,
  "referring_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referring provider */,
  "referred_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referred provider */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date the referral was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the referral (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "special_instructions" TEXT /* Special instructions for the referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES medical_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_referring_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("referring_provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_referred_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("referred_provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preauthorizations" (
  "preauth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preauthorization */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being preauthorized */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical service being preauthorized */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider performing the service */,
  "preauth_date" TEXT /* Date the preauthorization was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the preauthorization (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "authorization_code" TEXT /* Authorization code for the preauthorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preauth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preauthorizations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES medical_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preauthorizations_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preauthorizations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical service */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., in-person, virtual) */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service cost */,
  "visit_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the visit */,
  "paid_amount" REAL /* Amount paid by the patient */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visit (e.g., completed, scheduled) */,
  "chief_complaint" TEXT /* Chief complaint of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES service_costs ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES medical_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virtual_visits" (
  "virtual_visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virtual visit */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient visit */,
  "visit_url" TEXT /* URL for the virtual visit */,
  "visit_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the virtual visit */,
  "visit_medium" TEXT /* Medium of the virtual visit (e.g., video, phone) */,
  "visit_status" TEXT /* Status of the virtual visit (e.g., completed, scheduled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("virtual_visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_visits_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service limit */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical service */,
  "limit_description" TEXT /* Description of the limitation or exception */,
  "limit_type" TEXT /* Type of limit (e.g., frequency, quantity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_limits_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES medical_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient visit */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient visit */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date of claim */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient visit */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of reminder */,
  "reminder_message" TEXT /* Message for the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date of message */,
  "message_time" TEXT /* Time of message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_messages_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
